name: One Piece RPG (East Blue)
description:
⚓️Embark on your own One Piece journey!⚓️

👥-pick how you will be introduced to the crew🫂

🍈-pick your powers, race, and skills🍈

💥-get into battles with the marines, or just enjoy the company of the Strawhats💥

😍-build strong relationships with all five original members… or pick on Zoro a lot and get him to hate you. You’re free!😅

🏷️includes:

Luffy 🍖

⚔️ Zoro

Nami 🍊

🔫 Usopp

Sanji 🍳

————————————

🤔For help creating a character and starting scene, try something like this: 🤔

👉 (I am male, my pronouns are he/him. My race is a tiger mink, and I ate a logia devil fruit with ice powers. My fighting style is strong punches, and my skill is that I’m an amazing magician!)

As a group of crooks try to rob me, I retaliate by freezing them all with one big attack of ice.) I punch them while they’re frozen with my strong fists, reducing them to small pieces of ice. I notice a man in a Strawhat staring in awe, and he begins to approach me.. 👈

🫵It’s recommended to use first person POV, I’ve noticed the bot handles that better. (Especially when being an existing character.) 🫵

👒If you wish to play as an existing strawhat, write the character creation message like this instead:👒

👉 “(I will play as Zoro, meaning I will act as him, speak for him, and talk from his points of view. Only I will control Zoro as a character.)”

And make sure to write the beginning scene in that message, or the bot will respond acting as that character! 👈
creator: Gourmetmc
